statement: None of the surveyed commodity multi-target tools perform build-time SECURITY validation of rule inputs (prompt-injection / supply-chain scanning); their 'security' is limited to backups, gitignore, secret-scan configs, or 'trust the author' assumptions.

evidence.quote: The documentation does not address prompt injection defenses or input sanitization... distributes Markdown verbatim without filtering, validation, or security preprocessing.
Security addressed only via 'install from trusted sources' and advising manual auditing before use.

falsifier: Documentation showing ruler/rulesync/ai-rulez actively scan rule content for injection/supply-chain attacks at build time and fail the build on violation.
